title: amelia media
intro: Amelia media, commonly known as the "Amelia media plant", is a plant species that is not found in my data.
parts: Amelia media has many medicinal parts, such as roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain various bioactive compounds. The roots of Amelia media are known to contain alkaloids, including ameliaidine and amelia alkaloid, which may possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The leaves of the plant are rich in flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The flowers of Amelia media contain triterpenoids, including ameliaflavone and ameliaol, which may exhibit anti-cancer and immunomodulatory activities.
